name_en: Lady Dior Quilted Matte Calfskin Flap Bag, including the textured metal chain handle, features a textured matte finish that is versatile and elegant.
name_cn:
Lady Dior Quilted Matte Calfskin Flap Bag, including the textured metal chain handle, features a textured matte finish that is versatile and elegant.
Ultra mat finish metal accessories. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Dimensions: 17cm
Model: 6603
